title: WF11 8SQ, Enfinium Ferrybridge 2 Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/XP3833DK/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Enfinium Ferrybridge 2 Limited   Installation name: Ferrybridge 2   Permit number: EPR/XP3833DK/V005   "
